body.body: Three bugs from one exchange. Start by finding the habit that produces the Mashter/I-dont-know-that-one response — inspect its trigger in the live DB. Then: (1) fix routing so knowledge queries (what do you know about X, what have you learned about X) fall through to LLM + cortex.search, not canned response. (2) ensure habit execution traces go to forensic log only, not response text. (3) character voice in canned responses should not fire on knowledge/factual intent. Diagnosis script in ticket #248. Size S.
body.title: Fix three response bugs: habit trace leak, knowledge misrouting, Mashter (#248)
body.result: Fixed 3 bugs: (1) PROC_RESP_DONT_KNOW trigger trimmed — removed 'what do you know about'/'have you heard of' so knowledge queries fall through to LLM+cortex.search; (2) main.py: cognitive/passive_capture habits with no action template now fall through to LLM (HABIT_FALLTHROUGH ring entry) instead of leaking 'Habit executed. [...]' debug text to response; (3) basal_ganglia.py G-OVN-1c: response habits with suppress_on_factual_intent=true skip on factual_question intent — PROC_RESP_DONT_KNOW flagged accordingly. PROC_LIST_ABSORBED_BOOKS trigger also tightened (removed 'what have you learned' which was too broad).
